name: Pineapple Vinaigrette Udon Noodles
intro: Thai food is rich in flavor, but dishes are heavy and time-consuming. My answer is a refreshing salad with mango, ginger root and jalapeño.
method: Cook noodles according to package directions. When done, let it sit in a cold bath. Drain well.
In a small bowl, add the pineapple juice, sesame oil, white wine vinegar, gingerroot, and jalapeno pepper and stir.
Pour the mixture (Step 2) over noodles (Step 1). Mix well. Keep it in the refrigerator.
Add all the toppings ingredients to the noodles. Toss until well combined.
Sprinkle sesame seeds onto the noodles before serving.
